name: Back Squat
description: Barbell squat to parallel or below with braced trunk and neutral spine.

name: Front Squat
description: Barbell squat with front rack position; emphasizes upright torso and quad demand.

name: Goblet Squat
description: Hold a dumbbell or kettlebell at chest and squat with controlled depth.

name: Split Squat
description: Stationary lunge position; lower under control keeping front knee tracking over toes.

name: Walking Lunge
description: Alternating steps into a lunge with upright torso and stable knee alignment.

name: Step-Up
description: Step onto a box/bench driving through the whole foot; control the descent.

name: Conventional Deadlift
description: Hip hinge from the floor with braced trunk; push the ground away and lock out tall.

name: Romanian Deadlift
description: Hinge with soft knees; lower until hamstring stretch then drive hips forward.

name: Kettlebell Swing
description: Explosive hip hinge; hike the bell and snap hips to project it forward.

name: Hip Thrust
description: Upper back on bench; drive hips up to full extension squeezing glutes at top.

name: Glute Bridge
description: Feet planted; lift hips by squeezing glutes while maintaining rib-down position.

name: Good Morning
description: Barbell on upper back; hinge forward with neutral spine and return under control.

name: Bench Press
description: Press barbell from chest with stable shoulder blades and controlled touch point.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
description: Press dumbbells with neutral wrist and controlled range; keep shoulders packed.

name: Push-Up
description: Straight-line body; lower chest toward floor and press while maintaining brace.

name: Overhead Press
description: Press bar overhead with stacked ribs and pelvis; avoid excessive low-back arch.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
description: Press dumbbells overhead with controlled tempo; keep forearms vertical.

name: Parallel Bar Dip
description: Lower with shoulders controlled; press to lockout without shrugging.

name: Pull-Up
description: Start from dead hang; pull chest up by driving elbows down and back.

name: Chin-Up
description: Supinated grip pull; keep ribs down and avoid swinging.

name: Lat Pulldown
description: Pull bar to upper chest by driving elbows down; keep torso stable.

name: Barbell Row
description: Hinge to stable torso angle; row bar to lower ribs without jerking.

name: One-Arm Dumbbell Row
description: Support on bench; row toward hip keeping shoulder packed and spine neutral.

name: Face Pull
description: Pull toward face with elbows high; externally rotate and squeeze upper back.

name: Farmer's Carry
description: Walk with heavy implements at sides; stay tall with steady, controlled steps.

name: Suitcase Carry
description: Single-side carry; resist lateral bending and keep hips level.

name: Overhead Carry
description: Carry weight overhead with locked-out elbow; maintain stacked posture.

name: Plank
description: Forearms on floor; keep ribs down and pelvis tucked to maintain neutral spine.

name: Side Plank
description: Elbow under shoulder; lift hips and keep body in a straight line.

name: Dead Bug
description: Supine; brace and extend opposite arm/leg without low-back lifting.

name: Hollow Hold
description: Posterior pelvic tilt; hold hollow body position with low back pressed down.

name: Pallof Press
description: Anti-rotation press; extend arms without letting torso rotate.

name: Hanging Knee Raise
description: Hang with control; lift knees by curling pelvis, avoiding swinging.
